payload.answer: Do not store the proposed conversation_summary card as durable memory.
citations: LLM proposal - one conversation_summary card containing an entire 8000 word transcript
payload.reason: The input is an LLM proposal to store an entire 8000 word transcript as a single conversation_summary card, not a durable user memory. Raw or bulk transcripts are not appropriate durable memory without specific, stable facts or user preferences to preserve.

raw_text: {"durable":false,"decision":"do_not_store","reason":"The input is an LLM proposal to store an entire 8000 word transcript as a single conversation_summary card, not a durable user memory.
